name: Surveillance Work -Taboo-
short_description: Please repeatedly "Surveillance" and "Search" to arrive at the truth. You are hereby appointed as the Surveillance Officer for Facility Surveillance Operations. Your continued employment will be determined based on your performance and health condition.
detailed_description:
◆Story

You are hereby appointed as the Surveillance Officer for Facility Surveillance Operations. During a five-day probationary period, your work performance will be evaluated. Your continued employment will be determined based on your performance and health condition.

Please repeatedly "Surveillance" and "Search" to arrive at the truth.

◆Anomaly

1. Evolve

It undergoes three changes. Early reporting increases rewards.
Changes: objects appear, vanish, and move. Prolonged neglect causes camera failure.

2. Unknown

Clear anomaly appears / Camera placement and footage differ, etc.

Answer questions from On-Site Staff appropriately.

◆Search

You can view information about anomalies and operations by searching by ID or two distinct words.

◆Additional Notes

- Each tasks lasts about 12 minutes.

- There are about 60 anomalies in each facility.

- There are 20 endings.

◆How to play the old version

You can play the old version by following these steps.

1. Select "Surveillance Work" from your Steam library.

2. Click the gear icon in the top right and select "Properties" at the bottom.

3. Select the "Beta" tab and select "Legacy - 旧バージョン" from the drop-down list in the top right.

◆Video Upload and Live Stream Guidelines

"Surveillance Work -Taboo-" may be uploaded or streamed by individuals and organizations without prior approval.

However, please adhere to the following guidelines:

- Include the game's name in your video title.

- We kindly request that you include a link to the Steam page in your video description.

- Monetization is permitted only if you use the monetization features provided by video-sharing platforms, such as the YouTube Partner Program.

- Developer Maki Toguro assumes no responsibility for any damages arising from the posting or streaming of game videos.

- Do not use any part of the in-game ending sequence in your live streams or as video thumbnails.

- Please refrain from uploading videos that consist solely of the in-game ending sequence, whether in its original form or simply spliced together.

* The term "ending sequence" refers to any section labeled as "Ending" or "???" in the upper left corner of the screen.

* There is absolutely no issue with showing the ending sequence during live streams or gameplay commentary when progressing through or completing "Surveillance Work -Taboo-."
